# UKStander - Curated Deals Dashboard

Welcome to UKStander's LLM specification file.

UKStander provides a curated selection of affiliate products and daily deals for UK consumers.

## Resources
- [Home Page](https://ukstander.shop/)
- [Login](https://ukstander.shop/login)
- [Signup](https://ukstander.shop/signup)
- [Sitemap](https://ukstander.shop/sitemap.xml)
- [About Us](https://ukstander.shop/about)
- [Contact Us](https://ukstander.shop/contact)

## APIs
We do not offer a public API at this time, but users can access curated deals through our web application.
